name: class-time-table
description: A sleek, interactive **College Class Timetable Web App**, built using **HTML, CSS, and JavaScript**, and developed with assistance from **AI tools like ChatGPT**. Hosted on Vercel, it’s fully responsive and designed to simplify how students track their weekly class schedule.

scripts.build: tailwindcss -i ./css/input.css -o ./css/styles.css && mkdir -p public && cp -r *.html css js favicon *.png manifest.json service-worker.js public/ 2>/dev/null || true
